name: Stanley 51-621 16oz Curve Claw Hammer
description: Forged carbon steel head with rim temper for durability. The fibreglass handle provides excellent balance and reduces vibration on repeated strikes.

name: DeWalt DWHT51054 20oz Rip Claw Hammer
description: One-piece steel construction with a straight claw for prying and demolition work. The textured rubber grip minimises slippage during extended framing sessions.

name: Irwin 1954889 Fibreglass General Purpose Striking Tool
description: A versatile 16oz driving implement suited to everyday nailing and light demolition. The fibreglass shaft keeps weight low while the magnetic nail starter speeds one-handed work.

name: Milwaukee 48-22-9040 Milled-Face Framing Hammer
description: Designed for professional framing contractors, the milled striking face grips nails to prevent glancing blows. Anti-vibration system absorbs shock through the steel I-beam handle.

name: Thor 712R Copper and Rawhide Mallet
description: Dual-purpose mallet with interchangeable copper and rawhide faces. Ideal for assembly work where a non-marring striking tool is needed to seat joints without denting the workpiece.

name: Tekton Jacketed Fibreglass Ball Peen Hammer 12oz
description: Ball peen head for metalwork, riveting, and shaping operations. The jacketed fibreglass handle resists overstrike damage and provides a comfortable, sure grip.

name: Stiletto TiBone 15oz Titanium Framing Hammer
description: Ultra-lightweight titanium head delivers the driving force of a heavier steel striking tool with less arm fatigue. Replaceable steel face insert extends service life on hardened nails.

name: Nupla SPS-105 Dead Blow Hammer
description: Shot-filled head eliminates rebound when seating parts and driving pins. Non-sparking and non-marring, making it safe for use around flammable materials and finished surfaces.

name: Halder Simplex Soft-Face Mallet Size 40
description: German-made soft-face mallet with replaceable nylon and rubber inserts. Delivers controlled strikes for woodworking joinery and machine assembly without damaging the workpiece.

name: Faithfull FAIJWM Joiners Wooden Mallet
description: Traditional beechwood mallet for chisel work and joint assembly. The tapered head ensures square contact with chisel handles, directing force cleanly into the cut.

name: Klein Tools 85076 7-Piece Cushion-Grip Screwdriver Set
description: Professional-grade set covering Phillips and slotted sizes for electrical and general trades. Chrome-plated shafts resist corrosion while the cushion grip provides torque and comfort.

name: Wera Kraftform Kompakt 25 Bit-Holding Screwdriver
description: Compact ratcheting handle that accepts standard quarter-inch hex bits from the included set. The Rapidaptor chuck locks bits securely for single-handed operation in tight spaces.

name: Vessel MegaDora Impacta No.2 Phillips Driver
description: Impact-rated through-tang driver that can be struck with a hammer to free seized fasteners. The high-torque grip and precision-machined tip prevent cam-out on stubborn screws.

name: PB Swiss 8100/6 ESD Rainbow Screwdriver Set
description: Six-piece set with colour-coded handles for quick size identification. Swiss-made tips fit screw recesses tightly, reducing damage to fastener heads during assembly.

name: Milwaukee 48-22-2761 11-in-1 Multi-Tip Driver
description: A multi-bit fastener-driving tool that stores ten additional tips in the handle cavity. ECX profiles included for combination-head screws found in electrical boxes.

name: Felo 50174 Ergonic Slotted Screwdriver 5.5mm
description: Single-size slotted driver with a hardened molybdenum-vanadium blade. The Ergonic two-component handle design transfers maximum torque while keeping wrist strain low.

name: DeWalt MaxFit 30-Piece Screwdriver Bit Set
description: Comprehensive bit collection in a durable case, featuring Phillips, square, Torx, and slotted profiles. The MaxFit geometry grips screw recesses to reduce stripping and wobble.

name: Tekton Everybit Ratchet Driver and Bit Set
description: 72-tooth ratcheting handle with a full array of tamper-proof and security bits. Ideal for technicians who encounter specialty fasteners on electronics and appliances.

name: Stanley FatMax Insulated VDE Screwdriver Set
description: Five-piece VDE-rated set for live electrical work up to 1000V. Each insulated driver undergoes individual dielectric testing and features a high-visibility orange shank.

name: Bahco ERGO Stubby Phillips PH2 Driver
description: Short-shank fastener driver for confined-space access behind pipes and in junction boxes. The wide handle maximises palm contact for efficient torque transfer in awkward positions.

name: Irwin Marathon 15-Inch Universal Handsaw
description: Triple-ground teeth cut on both push and pull strokes for fast cross-cutting. The ProTouch handle reduces fatigue during prolonged ripping and trim work on site.

name: Bahco 2600 XT Hardpoint Handsaw 22-Inch
description: A fast-cutting panel saw with induction-hardened teeth that stay sharp through demanding site work. Thermo-plastic handle aligns the wrist for controlled push strokes.

name: Gyokucho 770-3600 Dozuki Fine Crosscut Saw
description: Japanese pull-stroke cutting tool with ultra-thin kerf for precise joinery. The rigid spine keeps the blade tracking straight through dovetails and tenon shoulders.

name: Stanley FatMax 20-520 Coping Saw
description: Lightweight frame saw for intricate curved cuts in trim and moulding. Quick-release blade tensioner allows rapid blade changes when navigating tight scrollwork.

name: Veritas Dovetail Saw 20 TPI
description: Premium back saw with a filed rip-tooth pattern for cutting dovetail joints. The progressive-pitch teeth start the kerf easily and accelerate through the cut.

name: Silky PocketBoy 170mm Folding Blade
description: Compact folding pull-stroke cutting tool for pruning and bushcraft. The impulse-hardened teeth slice through green and dry wood with minimal effort.

name: Milwaukee 48-22-0012 12-Inch Hacksaw
description: Metal-cutting saw with tool-free blade changes and adjustable frame tension. Bi-metal blade cuts conduit, threaded rod, and small-diameter pipe on the job site.

name: Zona 35-670 Ultra Thin Kerf Razor Saw
description: Exceptionally fine-toothed cutting tool for model-making and miniature woodwork. The thin blade produces a narrow kerf that minimises material waste on small-scale projects.

name: Stanley No.5 Jack Plane
description: Versatile 14-inch bench plane for flattening, jointing, and dimensioning rough lumber. The adjustable chip-breaker curls shavings cleanly across the width of the iron.

name: Irwin Marples M444 6-Piece Bevel Edge Chisel Set
description: Six-piece set covering widths from 6mm to 25mm for general bench work. The bevelled edges allow access to tight corners during dovetailing and hinge mortising.

name: Lie-Nielsen No.60-1/2 Low-Angle Block Plane
description: Compact low-angle smoothing plane for end grain, chamfers, and fine trimming. Ductile iron body and A2 steel blade deliver chatter-free performance on figured hardwoods.

name: Narex Richter 26mm Extra Bevel Edge Chisel
description: Premium paring blade with a CR-V steel body hardened to 59 HRC. Exceptional edge retention makes it a favourite among furniture makers shaping fine joinery.

name: Faithfull No.4-1/2 Smoothing Plane
description: Wide-bodied bench plane that covers more surface per pass for efficient stock removal. The lateral adjustment lever ensures even shaving thickness across the 2-3/8-inch iron.

name: Stanley 16-150 Short Blade 750 Series Wood Chisel Set
description: Four-piece edge cutter set with through-tang construction that withstands mallet blows. The shorter blade length improves control during close paring and hinge fitting.

name: Veritas Apron Plane
description: Pocket-sized plane for quick chamfers and easing sharp edges. Weighs only 290 grams, making it convenient to carry in a tool belt or apron pocket all day.

name: Two Cherries 1/2-Inch Firmer Chisel
description: Solingen-forged firmer chisel for heavy-duty carpentry and timber framing. The thick, flat blade handles leverage prying and deep chopping better than lighter bench chisels.

name: Irwin Quick-Grip XP600 12-Inch Bar Clamp
description: One-handed trigger clamp that delivers up to 600 lbs of clamping pressure. Converts to a spreader by reversing the jaw for disassembly and glue-up tasks.

name: Bessey TGJ2.524 24-Inch Tradesman Bar Clamp
description: Heavy-duty sliding arm workholding device with a high-visibility tommy bar for firm tightening. Replaceable pads protect finished surfaces during panel glue-ups.

name: Jorgensen 3712-HD 12-Inch Wood Handscrew Clamp
description: Traditional maple-jaw handscrew that applies even pressure across irregular and tapered surfaces. Dual spindles allow angled clamping for complex glue-up geometries.

name: Yost LV-4 Home Vise 4-1/2 Inch
description: Cast iron bench fixture with a 270-degree swivel base for versatile work positioning. Pipe jaws on the underside hold conduit and round stock for cutting.

name: Bessey EZS 6-Inch One-Hand Clamp
description: Compact trigger-operated workholding device for light assembly and hobby projects. The removable jaw pads accommodate delicate materials without leaving marks.

name: Wilton 11104 Wilton Bench Vise 4-Inch
description: Rugged machinist-grade bench vise with serrated steel jaws for metalwork. The enclosed slide bar prevents chip ingress and ensures smooth operation over years of service.

name: Stanley FatMax XL 6-Inch C-Clamp
description: Drop-forged C-frame clamp with a swivel pad that conforms to angled and curved workpieces. Acme-threaded spindle provides smooth, progressive clamping force.

name: Rockler Bandy Clamp
description: Specialised edge-banding clamp that applies pressure perpendicular to the panel face. Ideal for solid-wood edging and veneer application without the need for complex cauls.

name: Stanley FatMax 25ft Tape Measure
description: Professional measuring tape with a 13-foot standout blade for solo measurements. BladeArmor coating protects the first six inches from wear at the hook end.

name: Starrett C33H-12 Combination Square 12-Inch
description: Precision layout instrument for marking 90-degree and 45-degree angles on stock. The hardened blade and fine-ground head ensure repeatable accuracy across hundreds of marks.

name: Irwin STRAIT-LINE 64102 Chalk Reel 100ft
description: Snap-line marking tool for transferring long reference lines on subfloors and framing. The fast-wind gear ratio reels in the line quickly between snaps.

name: Swanson S0101 Speed Square 7-Inch
description: Multi-function layout tool that serves as a protractor, try square, and saw guide. Embossed degree markings allow quick rafter angle calculations on the job site.

name: Stabila 70-2-72 Spirit Level 72-Inch
description: Accurate to 0.029 degrees, this aluminium spirit level is built for door hanging, framing, and concrete formwork. Rubber end caps absorb drops on the job site.

name: Mitutoyo 530-312 Vernier Caliper 6-Inch
description: Precision measuring instrument readable to 0.001 inches for machining and turning. Stainless-steel beam with satin-chrome finish resists glare under workshop lighting.

name: Shinwa Bevel Gauge 150mm Stainless Steel
description: Adjustable sliding bevel for transferring and reproducing arbitrary angles between workpieces. The wing-nut lock holds the blade firmly at the set angle during repeated marking.

name: Incra T-RULE06 Precision Marking Rule 6-Inch
description: Ultra-precise rule with laser-etched increments down to 1/64 of an inch. The T-shaped end registers against the board edge for consistently parallel layout lines.

name: Knipex 8701250 Cobra 10-Inch Water Pump Pliers
description: Push-button adjustable pliers with self-locking jaws that grip pipes, nuts, and fittings without slipping. Forged chrome vanadium body resists spreading under heavy loads.

name: Channellock 430 10-Inch Tongue and Groove Pliers
description: American-made gripping tool with undercut tongue-and-groove channels that resist jaw slippage. Blue comfort grips and laser heat-treated teeth ensure long service life.

name: Wera Joker 6003 Combination Wrench Set 8-Piece
description: Open-end wrenches with a unique plate geometry that limits rounding of hex fasteners. The holding function keeps the wrench on the bolt during repositioning.

name: Klein Tools D2000-28 8-Inch Diagonal Cutting Pliers
description: High-leverage side-cutting pliers designed for electricians. The angled head provides clean cuts on copper wire and small-gauge steel cable in tight junction boxes.

name: Crescent 12-Inch Adjustable Wrench
description: Classic adjustable spanner with a wide-opening jaw accommodating fasteners up to 1-5/16 inches. Satin-chrome finish for corrosion resistance in damp environments.

name: Knipex 2611200 Long Nose Pliers 8-Inch
description: Precision needle-nose gripping tool for bending wire and reaching into confined spaces. Cross-hatched jaws hold components securely during electrical and jewellery work.

name: Tekton WRN50164 3/8-Inch Drive Ratchet
description: 72-tooth ratcheting wrench requiring only 5 degrees of swing arc in tight spaces. Sealed head keeps debris out and ensures smooth operation across thousands of cycles.

name: Irwin Vise-Grip 10WR 10-Inch Curved Jaw Locking Pliers
description: Self-locking gripping tool that clamps onto round, flat, and irregular stock. The wire cutter in the jaw handles up to 12-gauge wire without separate cutting pliers.

name: Milwaukee 48-22-4080 Compact Hand Drill
description: Eggbeater-style hand drill for delicate work where power tools would be too aggressive. Smooth gearing and an enclosed drive keep fingers safe during operation.

name: Fisch Wave Cutter Brad Point Drill Bit Set 8-Piece
description: Premium brad-point bits for clean, tear-free holes in hardwood and plywood. The wave-cutter flute design ejects chips efficiently to prevent overheating.

name: Stanley Ratcheting Brace 10-Inch Sweep
description: Traditional boring tool for driving auger bits and large-diameter Forstner bits by hand. The ratcheting mechanism allows half-turn operation in tight corners.

name: Irwin Speedbor Max Spade Bit Set 6-Piece
description: Flat boring bits with tri-flute cutting edges that clear material three times faster than standard spade bits. Self-feeding screw tips pull the bit through framing lumber.

name: Schroeder Hand Drill with Side Handle
description: Chest-brace style hand boring tool for controlled hole-making in fine woodworking. The side handle steadies the drill while the chuck accepts standard straight-shank bits up to 3/8 inch.

name: Bosch T4047 Forstner Bit Set 7-Piece
description: Forstner bits produce flat-bottomed holes for concealed hinges and dowel joints. Precision-ground rims slice cleanly through end grain and cross grain alike.

name: PrecisionDrive 6-Piece Screwdriver Set
description: Precision screwdriver set for electronics repair.1 Precision-ground tips on precision handles with precision grip zones. Each precision screwdriver is magnetised for precision fastener control. Precision electronics repair toolkit.

name: Vessel Impacta No.2 JIS Driver
description: Favoured by technicians for delicate board-level rework and micro-soldering on compact devices. Seats firmly in Japanese Industrial Standard recesses without cam-out. The slim barrel allows sustained control when swapping tiny components on densely packed circuit boards, reflowing solder joints, and navigating cramped enclosures. A quiet favourite in repair shops that service portable gadgets.

name: Wiha Precision Micro Screwdriver Set
description: Eight-piece ESD-safe precision screwdriver set designed for electronics repair and micro-assembly. Anti-static handles protect sensitive components while hardened CRM-V tips ensure long service life on small fasteners.

name: Wera Kraftform Big Pack 300 Screwdriver Set
description: Fourteen-piece general purpose screwdriver collection for household maintenance and automotive work. Includes Phillips, slotted, and Torx profiles in standard and stubby lengths for tight clearances around engines.

name: Mortise Chisel Heavy-Duty Hand Cut Joinery Chisel
description: This mortise chisel is purpose-built for hand-cut joinery. Mortise chopping demands a stiff blade and a mortise chisel delivers. Whether cutting mortise and tenon joints or hand-cut box joinery, this mortise chisel handles sustained mallet blows without flexing. The definitive mortise chisel for hand joinery.

name: Two Cherries 3/4" Pigsticker Oval-Bolster Mortise Chisel
description: Forged in Solingen from chrome vanadium steel. The oval bolster distributes mallet energy evenly into the blade, making it the preferred choice of furniture makers and joinery apprentices working traditional hand-cut through-mortises.

name: Record 52-1/2 Quick-Release Woodworking Vise
description: The go-to bench vise for joinery workshops. Holds stock firmly during hand-tool operations including chopping, paring, and sawing joints.

name: Narex Premium Bench Chisel 3/4-Inch
description: Czech-made bench chisel suitable for general joinery tasks. The blade holds an edge well through dovetailing and paring work, though it lacks the heft for sustained mortise chopping.

name: Stanley No.4 Smoothing Plane
description: Classic Bailey-pattern smoothing plane for final surface preparation. Adjustable frog and lateral lever allow fine mouth control for wispy shavings on hardwoods.

name: Reliable Claw Hammer General Carpentry 16oz
description: The reliable claw hammer for general carpentry use. 16oz head, curved claw for reliable nail pulling, reliable fibreglass handle absorbs reliable strike vibration. Reliable performance for general carpentry tasks.

name: Estwing E3-16C 16oz Curved Claw Hammer
description: Forged in one piece from American steel, the Estwing 16oz has been the professional carpenter's choice for decades. Nylon-vinyl grip reduces fatigue on framing and finish work alike.

name: Stanley FatMax 20oz Framing Hammer
description: Waffled face for nail-driving grip on framing and rough carpentry. Anti-vibe handle dampens impact. A workshop staple.

name: Lie-Nielsen Warrington Pattern Hammer
description: A reliable general carpentry hammer favoured by professionals for framing, trim work, and cabinet installation. The claw pulls nails cleanly and the forged head delivers consistent strikes for all-day carpentry projects.

name: Vaughan 999L 20oz Framing Rip Hammer
description: Straight-claw ripping hammer built for demolition and rough framing. Magnetically holds nails for one-handed starting on rafters and joists.
